name: docassemble-webapp

metadata.name: docassemble.webapp
metadata.summary: The web application components of the docassemble system.

documentation:
See the [docassemble web site] for a description of **docassemble**
and installation instructions.

To get help with using **docassemble**, join the [docassemble Slack
group].

[docassemble web site]: https://docassemble.org
[docassemble Slack group]: https://docassemble.org/docs/support.html

functions.name: docassemble.webapp.alembic.env.run_migrations_offline
documentation:
Run migrations in 'offline' mode.

This configures the context with just a URL
and not an Engine, though an Engine is acceptable
here as well.  By skipping the Engine creation
we don't even need a DBAPI to be available.

Calls to context.execute() here emit the given string to the
script output.
other values from the config, defined by the needs of env.py,

functions.name: docassemble.webapp.alembic.env.run_migrations_online
documentation:
Run migrations in 'online' mode.

In this scenario we need to create an Engine
and associate a connection with the context.

classes.name: docassemble.webapp.machinelearning.MachineLearningEntry

methods.name: docassemble.webapp.machinelearning.MachineLearningEntry.classify
documentation: Sets the dependent variable of the machine learning entry

methods.name: docassemble.webapp.machinelearning.MachineLearningEntry.save
documentation:
Saves the entry to the data set.  The independent variable must be
defined in order to save.

methods.name: docassemble.webapp.machinelearning.MachineLearningEntry.predict
documentation: Returns predictions for this entry's independent variable.
An entry in the machine learning system

documentation: Base class for machine learning objects

classes.name: docassemble.webapp.machinelearning.SimpleTextMachineLearner

methods.name: docassemble.webapp.machinelearning.SimpleTextMachineLearner._train
documentation: Trains the machine learner given an independent variable and a corresponding dependent variable.

methods.name: docassemble.webapp.machinelearning.SimpleTextMachineLearner.predict
documentation: Returns a list of predicted dependent variables for a given independent variable.

methods.name: docassemble.webapp.machinelearning.SimpleTextMachineLearner.confusion_matrix
documentation: Returns a confusion matrix for the model based on splitting the data set randomly into two pieces, training on one and testing on the other

methods.name: docassemble.webapp.machinelearning.SimpleTextMachineLearner.delete_by_key
documentation: Deletes all of the training data in the database that was added with a given key

methods.name: docassemble.webapp.machinelearning.SimpleTextMachineLearner.classified_entries
documentation: Returns a list of entries in the data that have been classified.

methods.name: docassemble.webapp.machinelearning.SimpleTextMachineLearner.unclassified_entries
documentation: Returns a list of entries in the data that have not yet been classified.

methods.name: docassemble.webapp.machinelearning.SimpleTextMachineLearner.one_unclassified_entry
documentation: Returns the first entry in the data that has not yet been classified, or None if all entries have been classified.

methods.name: docassemble.webapp.machinelearning.SimpleTextMachineLearner.save_for_classification
documentation: Creates a not-yet-classified entry in the data for the given independent variable and returns the ID of the entry.

methods.name: docassemble.webapp.machinelearning.SimpleTextMachineLearner.dependent_in_use
documentation: Returns a sorted list of unique dependent variables in the data.
A class used to interact with the machine learning system, using the K Nearest Neighbors method
